name: claude-commands
description: A small collection of custom Claude Code slash commands. Install all, or just the ones you want.

plugins.name: endit
plugins.description: End-of-session wrap-up — persists plans to Plans/ and a session log to Reports/.

plugins.name: reviewinator
plugins.description: Rates your changes /5 and flags P0/P1/P2 vulnerabilities as an HTML report.

plugins.name: standup
plugins.description: Summarizes today's work from git history, filtered/grouped by org.
